name: agent-fiscal-autonomy-plugin
description: Free OpenClaw/Codex plugin wrapper for Agent Fiscal Autonomy Pack proof, quote, Base USDC entitlement, and safe install handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Proof and commerce wrapper for the paid OpenClaw fiscal autonomy pack.
interface.longDescription: A free installable wrapper that helps an AI agent inspect strict JSON proof artifacts, understand safety boundaries, request a quote, pay by direct Base USDC invoice, verify entitlement, and install the paid derived-only Agent Fiscal Autonomy Pack. The paid data package is not included in this public plugin.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the fiscal autonomy proof artifacts.
Request a Base USDC quote for the audit.
